The [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]] '''T-65XJ X-wing starfighter''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]].

==Characteristics==
The XJ series boasted increased [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] capacity, better maneuverability, and higher sublight acceleration. The starfighter's weapons carried an increased charge and better targeting computers, making the craft a formidable enemy of the foes of the New Republic. Additionally, a third [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launcher was added to up the fighter's payload to 9 torpedoes total.<ref name="NJOS" />

==History==
The XJ model of Incom's incredibly successful [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] series was one of the more recent versions of the venerable starfighter. When the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|war against]] the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] started, these models were rarely seen outside of the [[New Jedi Order]] and elite [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] and [[Battlecruiser/Legends|battlecruiser]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]].<ref name="NJOS" />

==Models==
===XJ3 X-wing===
{{Main|T-65XJ3 X-wing starfighter}}
The XJ3 X-wing had come into service by the time of the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]. These supplemented the more advanced and more expensive Series III [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing escort starfighter]].

===StealthX===
{{Main|StealthX}}
The "StealthX" was in use in [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]] during the [[Killik/Legends|Killik]]/[[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Dark Nest Crisis|conflict]]. The Jedi tended to use the StealthX or earlier XJ3. The StealthX was a covert strike craft, equipped with features that reduced its visibility both visually and to sensors, though it could be located if it was silhouetted or launching proton torpedoes. The StealthX was described as being smaller than the XJ5 model. The StealthX was also described as being a derivative of the XJ3.

===XJ5 X-wing "ChaseX"===
{{Main|XJ5 X-wing starfighter}}
The XJ5 (or "'''ChaseX'''") was also in use during the Dark Nest Crisis. XJ5 fighters were used by the [[Reconstruction Authority Space Patrol]]. The XJ5 was a half a meter shorter than the T-65C.

===XJ6 X-wing===
{{Main|XJ6 X-wing starfighter}}
The XJ6 came into use by the Galactic Alliance before the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. Luke Skywalker's [[Hardpoint Squadron]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] used these fighters exclusively.

===XJ7 X-wing===
{{Main|XJ7 X-wing starfighter}}
The XJ7 would later be used by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] as of 40 ABY.
